title: Karnataka High Court bats for police verification of migrant workers hired as domestic helps
description: The Karnataka High Court recently opined that the State should come out with guidelines to regulate and verify the background of migrant workers who are hired to stay at the private residences of their employers. A Bench of Justices HP Sandesh and Venkatesh Naik made the suggestion after expressing concerns about incidents where migrant workers were reported to have been allegedly involved in serious offences such as murder and robbery at the premises where they were employed."In many such cases
